description: Spectral analysis for chemistry — UV-Vis, IR, Raman, NMR, and mass spectrometry. Peak finding, fitting, baseline correction, concentration calculations, and spectral matching.

packages.name: specutils
packages.description: Astropy-affiliated spectroscopic analysis — spectrum I/O, line finding, equivalent width, continuum fitting, smoothing, and template matching. Works with any 1D spectra.

packages.name: lmfit
packages.description: Non-linear least-squares curve fitting — Gaussian, Lorentzian, Voigt peak models, composite models, parameter constraints, confidence intervals, and MCMC analysis.

packages.name: nmrglue
packages.description: NMR data processing — read Bruker, Varian/Agilent, and pipe NMR formats. Apodization, zero-filling, Fourier transform, phasing, baseline correction, and peak picking.

packages.name: pybaselines
packages.description: Baseline estimation and removal for spectra — 40+ algorithms including ALS, SNIP, ModPoly, iModPoly, airPLS for UV-Vis, IR, Raman, and chromatography baselines.

packages.name: rampy
packages.description: Raman spectroscopy processing — baseline subtraction, smoothing, normalization, band fitting, machine learning classification, and database matching.

packages.name: pyopenms
packages.description: Mass spectrometry data processing — mzML/mzXML I/O, peak picking, chromatogram extraction, feature finding, identification, and quantification.

packages.name: matchms
packages.description: Mass spectral library matching — cosine similarity, modified cosine, spectral entropy, fingerprint-based scoring, and GNPS integration.

packages.name: scipy
packages.description: Signal processing and optimization — FFT, peak finding (find_peaks), curve fitting (curve_fit), Savitzky-Golay smoothing, and interpolation for spectral data.

packages.name: numpy
packages.description: Array operations — spectral data arrays, wavelength/frequency axes, numerical transformations, and linear algebra for spectral analysis.

packages.name: matplotlib
packages.description: Spectral visualization — plot spectra, overlays, peak annotations, absorbance/transmittance plots, and publication-quality spectral figures.
